center.id: loc-纽卡斯尔-新南威尔士州-74140f36
center.name: 纽卡斯尔 (新南威尔士州)
center.summary: 纽卡斯尔 (新南威尔士州)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Brown honeyeater，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown honeyeater is found in a wide range of wooded habitats, and is widespread across Australia. The nominate race ranges across a broad band from Newcastle on the New South Wales coast north and west to Queensland and the Top End to southwestern Western Australia
